Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 9 

CONDITION_CATEGORY_07 

LABEL: Special Needs Plan (SNP) — Condition Category 07 (Diabetes) 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies special needs plans (SNP) for diabetes mellitus (Condition Category 07). 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: N = Not a SNP for this Condition Category 
Y = SNP for this Condition Category 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs
